name: testDisableCreateButtonWhenAcquirerNameIsEmpty
description: Verify that 'Create' button is disabled when Acquirer name is empty.
descriptionHtml: Verify that 'Create' button is disabled when Acquirer name is empty.

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verify that 'Create' button is disabled when Acquirer name is empty.

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
